◎简　　介  

　　Contains three videos from that album and interview footage with excerpts from a lot of other videos. The American version (video tape as well as LaserDisc) contains much less interview footage than the British version. The British version is the complete 1989 VH-1 special.1. The Sensual World2. This Woman's Work3. Love And Anger
